title: [release-1.27] remove registry.centos.org
body:
registry.centos.org is now decommissioned

Ref: https://lists.centos.org/pipermail/centos-devel/2023-May/142956.html

Cherry-pick of #4825, which in turn is a cherry-pick of #4819

Signed-off-by: Aditya R <arajan@redhat.com>
Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

```release-note
None
```
